description: Fragment of a letter from Mardūk b. Musa from Alexandria to Nahray b. Nissim, Fustat. March 8, 1048. Regarding a large shipment of letters from the Maghrib. Marduk sends a large amount of letters to Fustat and asks Nahray to distribute them to the addressees. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #536) VMR
description_he: מכתב מאלכסנדריה לפוסטאט. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
